# @wendermedia/astro-components

> Complete Astro 6 development resource — production-ready, accessible, GDPR-compliant components for modern web development. 158 components across 17 categories. Source-available under the Wender Media Source License v1.0.

## Version

- Current: 3.0.0 (2026-05-08, Astro 6 + Tailwind 4)
- Legacy MIT release: 2.1.0 (Astro 4/5)

## Tech Stack

- Astro 6.x (peer dependency)
- Tailwind CSS 4.x via `@tailwindcss/vite` (templates)
- Node.js 22.12+
- TypeScript 5.x
- Vitest 4 (Unit + A11y testing)
- Storybook 10.x (Component docs)
- Style Dictionary (Design tokens)
- Changesets (Versioning)
- Vite 7 / 8 (downstream)

## Component Categories (17)

- `src/ui/` (21) — Modal, Tabs, Badge, Toast, Accordion, ProgressTracker, StatCard, CommandPalette, Drawer, Dropdown, Skeleton, Progress, Tooltip
- `src/sections/` (70+) — Hero, CTA, Pricing, Team, FAQ, Testimonials, TrustBar, TopBar, Timeline, Stats, Blog, Gallery, Contact, Newsletter, Awards, Careers
- `src/layouts/` (15) — Bento, Magazine, Dashboard, Portfolio, Newspaper, Docs, Split, Article, Landing, HeroLayout, ProductGrid
- `src/accessibility/` (12) — SkipLinks, ThemeToggle, FocusTrap, FontResizer, AccessibilityToolbar, LanguageSwitcher, TextToSpeech, ScreenReaderOnly, LiveRegion
- `src/seo/` (9) — SEO, OpenGraph, TwitterCard, JsonLD, RichSnippets, TitleTagEditor, HreflangTags, CanonicalURL, Breadcrumbs
- `src/ecommerce/` (5) — Cart, ProductCard, Wishlist, ProductQuickView, AddToCartButton
- `src/content/` (5) — ReadingProgress, ShareBar, TableOfContents, RelatedContent, ReadingTime
- `src/navigation/` (5) — Breadcrumbs, Pagination, MobileNav, Sidebar, AccessibleLoadMore
- `src/forms/` (3) — ContactForm, Contact, Newsletter
- `src/media/` (3) — VideoPlayer, AudioPlayer, ImageGallery
- `src/layout/` (2) — Header, Footer
- `src/maps/` (2) — GoogleMap (GDPR), OpenStreetMap
- `src/social/` (2) — SocialShare, SocialFollow
- `src/design-system/` (1) — DesignSystemProvider with CSS custom property tokens
- `src/gallery/` (1) — BeforeAfter image comparison slider
- `src/images/` (1) — OptimizedImage with blur-up LQIP
- `src/products/` (1) — ProductCard (affiliate)

## Additional Features

- `integrations/` — WordPress headless CMS, React, Vue, Svelte, Solid
- `tokens/` — Design tokens via Style Dictionary
- `cli/` — Project scaffolding tool (`create-wm-component`)
- `bundles/` — Pre-configured component bundles (Astro 6 + Tailwind 4)
- `templates/` — Project templates (default, minimal, ecommerce, blog, landing) using Astro 6 patterns (`ClientRouter`, Content Layer API)
- `testing/` — A11y test utilities

## Commands

- `npm run test` — Unit tests
- `npm run test:a11y` — Accessibility tests
- `npm run test:coverage` — Coverage report
- `npm run storybook` — Start Storybook (port 6006)
- `npm run tokens:build` — Build design tokens
- `npm run changeset` — Add a changeset

## Key Principles

- WCAG 2.1 AA / BFSG 2025 compliant
- GDPR/DSGVO ready (privacy-first, no third-party tracking)
- TypeScript-first with complete type definitions
- Dark mode support via CSS custom properties
- Astro-component keyword in `package.json` for Astro integrations catalogue auto-discovery

## Storybook

Browse all 158 components interactively: https://astro.wendermedia.com

## Keywords

astro-component, astro, astro6, components, ui, seo, accessibility, wcag, gdpr, dsgvo, bfsg, maps, social-share, react, vue, svelte, solid, content-collections, view-transitions, i18n, design-system, design-tokens, css-variables, theming, dark-mode, tailwind, tailwind4, wordpress, headless-cms

## Migration

Upgrading from 2.x: see `docs/MIGRATION-2.x-to-3.0.md` in the repository for the full Astro 6 + Tailwind 4 + license-model upgrade guide.
